# Golden file: platform.github pack
format: v1
---
# D1: delete repository
command: gh repo delete owner/repo --yes
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: platform.github
rule: gh-repo-delete
---
# D2: delete release
command: gh release delete v1.0.0 --yes
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: platform.github
rule: gh-release-delete
---
# D3: close issue is low severity
command: gh issue close 42 --yes
decision: Allow
severity: Low
confidence: Medium
pack: platform.github
rule: gh-issue-pr-close
---
# Safe: list issues
command: gh issue list
decision: Allow
